coupons.description: 10% off sitewide on tournaments and merchandise

product_categories.name: All Products

tournaments.name: Mile High Summer Jam
tournaments.description: A mid-summer inline hockey showdown in the heart of Denver featuring youth and adult divisions.

tournaments.name: Front Range Recreational Cup
tournaments.description: Casual 5v5 play for adult recreational teams from around the Front Range.

tournaments.name: Rocky Mountain Inline Fest
tournaments.description: Three days of competitive inline hockey with divisions from youth to adult elite.

tournaments.name: Denver Youth August Shootout
tournaments.description: Youth-only August tournament with strong competition and early-bird individual pricing.

tournaments.name: Front Range Youth Classic
tournaments.description: Multi-division youth event with skill levels from beginner to advanced and attractive early-bird deals.

tournaments.name: Chicago Fall Youth Classic
tournaments.description: Fall tournament in Chicago offering multiple youth age brackets with a four-game guarantee.

tournaments.name: Great Lakes Inline Fall Fest
tournaments.description: Regional fall youth festival with guaranteed games and flexible team packages.

tournaments.name: Windy City Autumn Cup
tournaments.description: Premier fall youth inline event near Chicago with five games guaranteed for most divisions.

tournaments.name: City Cup Inline Classic
tournaments.description: Signature summer event with team packages that can include jerseys, practices, and extras.

tournaments.name: Spring Inline Showdown
tournaments.description: Early-season tournament with adult elite and non-elite divisions plus flexible payment plans.

tournaments.name: Memorial Day Inline Bash
tournaments.description: Adult-focused Memorial Day weekend tournament with attractive full-team pricing.

tournaments.name: River City Spring Cup
tournaments.description: Local spring inline tournament ideal for teams tuning up for the summer season.

payment_plans.name: Deposit Only (Balance Before First Game)
payment_plans.description: Pay a deposit now and the remaining balance 7 days before the tournament.

payment_plans.name: Pay in Full
payment_plans.description: Full team fee due at checkout.

payment_plans.name: Pay in Full
payment_plans.description: One-time payment of the full team fee.

payment_plans.name: Deposit + Balance
payment_plans.description: Reserve your spot with a deposit and pay the balance later.

payment_plans.name: Pay in Full
payment_plans.description: Full team package cost charged at registration.

payment_plans.name: 3-Payment Plan
payment_plans.description: Pay a deposit now and two additional installments before the event.

payment_plans.name: Pay in Full
payment_plans.description: One installment covering the full team fee.

payment_plans.name: 3-Installment Plan
payment_plans.description: Deposit plus two equal follow-up payments.

payment_plans.name: Pay in Full
payment_plans.description: Standard pay-in-full option for team registration.

products.name: ProGuard Inline Helmet - Black
products.description: Lightweight inline hockey helmet with high-impact shell and multi-density foam. Certified for adult rec play.

products.name: Elite Pro Helmet - White
products.description: High-end helmet with extended occipital protection and moisture-wicking liner.

products.name: Impact Series Elbow Pads
products.description: Low-profile elbow pads with hard shell caps and breathable straps.

products.name: Swift Lite Shin Guards
products.description: Lightweight shin guards designed for inline hockey with wraparound calf protection.

products.name: Rookie Pro Gloves
products.description: Durable gloves with reinforced palms and excellent wrist mobility.

products.name: Custom Team Jersey - Home
products.description: Home-color sublimated inline jersey with custom team logo and player number.

products.name: Custom Team Jersey - Away
products.description: Away-color sublimated inline jersey with custom team logo and player number.

products.name: City Cup Fan Hoodie
products.description: Midweight fleece hoodie with City Cup Inline Classic logo.

products.name: Carbon Edge Inline Stick - Senior
products.description: Low-kick composite stick optimized for quick-release shots on sport court.

products.name: ABEC-9 Bearing Kit
products.description: Set of 16 high-speed bearings for inline hockey wheels.

products.name: Benchside Squeeze Water Bottle
products.description: 1L squeeze bottle with angled straw, perfect for use with a helmet cage.

products.name: Pro Travel Gear Bag
products.description: Oversized wheeled bag designed to fit full inline gear.

tournament_divisions.name: Adult Recreational 5v5
tournament_divisions.notes: No checking. Recreational skill level only.

tournament_divisions.name: Adult Recreational 5v5
tournament_divisions.notes: Ideal for adult house and bar league teams.

tournament_divisions.name: Adult Elite 5v5
tournament_divisions.notes: Premier adult elite division with championship banner.

tournament_divisions.name: 13U Advanced
tournament_divisions.notes: Early-bird rate available for individual signups before June 15.

tournament_divisions.name: 13U Advanced
tournament_divisions.notes: Advanced travel teams only; mixed birth years allowed within age range.

tournament_divisions.name: 14U Advanced
tournament_divisions.notes: 5-game guarantee with championship trophy and medals.

tournament_divisions.name: Adult Open 5v5
tournament_divisions.notes: Open skill level; suitable for most adult travel teams.

tournament_divisions.name: Adult Elite 5v5
tournament_divisions.notes: Top-tier elite division with cash prize for champions.

tournament_divisions.name: Adult Elite 5v5
tournament_divisions.notes: Elite-only division currently used by Inline Elite.

tournament_divisions.name: Adult Competitive 5v5
tournament_divisions.notes: Intended for strong adult teams not playing in elite.

tournament_divisions.name: Adult Beginner 5v5
tournament_divisions.notes: Ideal for new adult teams and rec leagues.

tournament_packages.name: Standard Team Entry
tournament_packages.description: Basic team entry with 4-game guarantee. Jerseys and practices not included.

tournament_packages.name: Team Jerseys + 1 Practice
tournament_packages.description: Includes team jerseys for all rostered players and one 60-minute practice session.

tournament_packages.name: Team Jerseys + 2 Practices
tournament_packages.description: Includes full set of team jerseys and two pre-tournament practice sessions.

tournament_packages.name: Premium Bundle (Jerseys + 3 Practices)
tournament_packages.description: Premium package with team jerseys, three practices, and bench water service.

tournament_packages.name: Team Jerseys Upgrade
tournament_packages.description: Upgrade package that adds custom team jerseys for all rostered players.

tournament_packages.name: Jersey Add-On
tournament_packages.description: Custom home jerseys for up to 12 players.

tournament_packages.name: Individual Skill Clinic + Practice
tournament_packages.description: Optional skill clinic the evening before the tournament, including one on-rink practice session.
